onboarding.title: Welcome to Our App!
onboarding.description: Discover amazing features and get started on your journey.

home.app_bar_search_placeholder: en_ค้นหาด้วยคำหรือรูปภาพ

login.title: en_Get Started with Us
login.subtitle: en_Fill in below to see if you already have an account.
login.text_field_placeholder: en_Fill in 10-digit mobile no. or email
login.blank_input_error_message: en_Email or Mobile no. is required.

logout.modal_title: en_Log Out from NocNoc Inspire App?

en_Hope to see you back to get inspired

register.title: en_Create NocNoc Account
register.description:
en_Enjoy shopping with member-only privileges, fill in
your info below to create an account.
register.password_invalid_error_message: en_Password must conform to the rules.
register.invalid_input_error_message: en_Fill in a valid mobile no.
register.existing_phone_number_error_message: en_You've previously logged in with this mobile no.
register.create_account_error_message: en_Unable to create NocNoc account, try again.

set_password.title: en_Reset Your Password
set_password.description: en_Fill in your registered mobile number or email.
set_password.success_description: en_You can now log in with your new password.

set_phone.title: en_Edit Mobile Number
set_phone.description: en_Link your new mobile number to your account.
set_phone.duplicate_error_message: en_This mobile number has already been used to create an account.

verify_user.title: en_Verify With Mobile No. or Email
verify_user.description: en_To securely edit your info, fill in mobile number or email you registered with us.
verify_user.identity_not_match_error_message: The mobile number or email address does not match the one registered in the system.
verify_user.user_not_found_error_message: No account was found registered with this mobile number or email address.

otp.title: en_Verify with OTP
otp.description: en_Fill in the 6-digit OTP that we sent to {target}. If you didn’t receive it, tap resend when timer ends.
otp.incorrect_error_message: รหัสยืนยันไม่ถูกต้อง ลองอีกครั้งหรือขอรหัสใหม่

กรอก OTP ไม่ถูกต้องเกินจำนวนครั้งที่กำหนด
รอ [120] วินาที และลองอีกครั้ง
